stories.title: Netherlands break WC record with Sweden thumping
stories.summary: Ronald Koeman has said Netherlands' 5-1 win over Sweden will send a message to their World Cup rivals that they can be "dangerous" at the tournament.

stories.title: Canes fans jam Raleigh for Stanley Cup parade
stories.summary: Thousands of Hurricanes fans crammed onto sidewalks, gathered around office building windows, even lined up on floor after floor of at least one parking deck to cheer and wave at the team's Stanley Cup championship parade Saturday.

stories.title: Reese fastest WNBA player to grab 1,000 rebounds
stories.summary: In her first season with Atlanta and third in the league, Angel Reese became the fastest in WNBA history to reach 1,000 career rebounds, reaching the milestone in her 79th game, as the Atlanta Dream earned a 113-96 victory over the Indiana Fever Saturday.

stories.title: Brewers' Murphy set to have hip, back surgeries
stories.summary: Brewers manager Pat Murphy said Saturday he's planning to have back surgery on Thursday, when the team is off, and a procedure on his hip during the All-Star break.

stories.title: van Gisbergen on pole for NASCAR Coronado race
stories.summary: Shane van Gisbergen qualified first Saturday for NASCAR's inaugural race on Naval Base Coronado on Sunday, easily outpacing Carson Hocevar, who will join him on the front row.
